statement_html:
On considère le nombre \obsList[random(1..wims(rowcnt \obsList));] . Dans la liste ci-dessous, cochez tous les ensembles auquel le nombre \obsList[random(1..wims(rowcnt \obsList));] appartient.

\for{k=1 to 3}{ }
wims(append line \propsList[\i;] to )[\k;]
wims(append line \propsList[\i;] to )[(\k+3);]

answers.expected: wims(append item position(\i,wims(append item wims(rowcnt \propsList)-1+1 to wims(sort numeric item wims(item 1 to 5 of wims(rowcnt \propsList-1))))) to );1,2,3,4,5,6
